description: Takes preprocessed images and proceeds to analyze them, the main steps include taking the preprocessed image and analyzing it

4a75e862-2bcd-49db-89de-e4655ac155cc.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
4a75e862-2bcd-49db-89de-e4655ac155cc.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

b4ea2d54-4ff1-4bf5-84b0-d9eeec480dfa.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
b4ea2d54-4ff1-4bf5-84b0-d9eeec480dfa.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
